user_query: What does Andrew view his pets as?

selected_nodes.text: Andrew believes that taking care of pets to ensure they are healthy and happy is important.

selected_nodes.text: Andrew is looking forward to bonding better with his pet dog, Toby, and seeks tips on taking care of him.
